_doc: Per-family commands run BEFORE gftools-builder / fontc / fontmake, for families whose
sources must be generated or pre-compiled first.
Each command runs through the shell with:
- cwd  = the extracted upstream source tree (at the pinned commit)
- PATH = the family's build venv bin first (so fontmake / fonttools / gftools / python
resolve to the pinned build toolchain)
Commands run in order; a non-zero exit fails the family with a clear 'pre-build' error.
Only the 'rules' object is read. Keys are family slugs (e.g. 'ofl/cairoplay'). '_example'
below shows the shape and is ignored by the tool.
This file is version-controlled; edit it to register new pre-compile steps.

ofl/cairoplay.note: Cairo Play ships generated sources under sources/generated/ via a build script

ofl/cairo.note: Gue3bara/Cairo: sources/cairo.yaml builds CairoNormal.glyphs, which build.sh generates from sources/Cairo.glyphs via scripts/makenormal.py (needs glyphsLib, in the base venv).

ofl/cairoplay.note: Gue3bara/Cairo: sources/cairoplay.yaml builds CairoPlay.glyphs, which build.sh generates from sources/Cairo.glyphs via scripts/makeplay.py.
